name: tclutils::tucmp

name: tclutils::tucodepng

name: tclutils::tucomm

name: tclutils::tucsplit

name: tclutils::tucsv

name: tclutils::tucut

name: tclutils::tudate

name: tclutils::tudav

name: tclutils::tudeploy

name: tclutils::tudiagram

name: tclutils::tudict
description: Pure Tcl dict utility library with nested defaults, deep merging and key-value inversion.

name: tclutils::tudiff

name: tclutils::tuer

name: tclutils::tuevent

name: tclutils::tuexe

name: tclutils::tuexpand

name: tclutils::tufetch

name: tkutils
description: Expansive collection of Tcl/Tk GUI widgets.

description: Tk action abstraction: define a UI action once and keep any number of registered widgets in sync.

description: Tk balloon tooltip widget attaching hover-delay popups to any widget.

name: tkutils::tkubind
description: Tk platform-aware keyboard and mouse binding helper with an edit-widget focus guard.

name: tkutils::tkucanvaspng

name: gtk4tcl
description: Gtk4Tcl is a modern, premium Tcl extension for GTK4 using a fast FFI bridge. It offers a Tcl-friendly API with declarative widget creation, reactive MVC data binding, GtkBuilder XML export, custom widgets, and high-performance canvas/OpenGL graphics pipelines. Perfect for building elegant, responsive cross-platform GTK4 desktop applications.

name: chantricks
description: Tcl channel utilities.

name: names
description: Name generator for Tcl.

name: aws-tcl
description: AWS SDK for Tcl, generated from botocore. Mirrors the AWS CLI. Uses standard AWS CLI configuration (profiles, credentials, region, endpoints).

name: tclmtls
description: tclmtls package to provide SSL/TLS support in Tcl.
